complaintText: I was charged $49.99 twice this month for my premium subscription. Please refund the duplicate charge.
Someone made three purchases on my account totaling $1,200 that I did not authorize. I suspect my card has been compromised.
My invoice shows a charge for a service I cancelled two months ago. The amount is $15. Can you look into it?
Hi, I just want to know when my next billing cycle starts. No issues, just planning ahead.
I have been trying to get a refund for three weeks now. Every time I call I get transferred and nobody resolves it. This is $300 we are talking about.
The app crashes every time I try to open it. I have restarted my phone, reinstalled the app, nothing works. I cannot access my account at all.
Pages are loading a bit slowly today. Not a big deal but thought I would mention it.
I requested a password reset email four times and nothing arrived. I have checked spam. I need access to submit a payment by Friday.
After the latest update, the export to PDF button does nothing. It used to work fine last week.
My data on the mobile app does not match what I see on the website. The balances are completely different.
I ordered a new router two weeks ago and it still has not arrived. The tracking page shows no updates since day one.
I received a completely different product than what I ordered. I ordered a blue case and got a red charger.
The package arrived but the box was crushed and the item inside is scratched. I would like a replacement.
My delivery was supposed to arrive yesterday. It now says delayed by three business days. Not urgent but a bit annoying.
My account has been locked after several failed login attempts. I know my password is correct. I need access urgently for a transaction.
I moved to a new address and need to update my account details. Nothing urgent.
I would like to close my account and delete all my personal data as per GDPR. Please confirm the process and timeline.
I just received an alert that someone logged into my account from a country I have never been to. Please lock my account immediately.
Just wanted to say your new dashboard redesign looks great. Keep up the good work!
I received an email asking for my password and account number that claims to be from your company. It looks suspicious. I have not clicked any links but I am worried my data may already be exposed.
